Name: FAnimPhysConstraintSetup
Description: Constraint setup struct, holds data required to build a physics constraint

Variables.Name: LinearXLimitType
Variables.Description: Whether to limit the linear X axis

Variables.Name: LinearYLimitType
Variables.Description: Whether to limit the linear Y axis

Variables.Name: LinearZLimitType
Variables.Description: Whether to limit the linear Z axis

Variables.Name: LinearAxesMin
Variables.Description: Minimum linear movement per-axis (Set zero here and in the max limit to lock)

Variables.Name: LinearAxesMax
Variables.Description: Maximum linear movement per-axis (Set zero here and in the min limit to lock)

Variables.Name: AngularConstraintType
Variables.Description: Method to use when constraining angular motion

Variables.Name: TwistAxis
Variables.Description: Axis to consider for twist when constraining angular motion (forward axis)

Variables.Name: ConeAngle
Variables.Description: Angle to use when constraining using a cone

Variables.Name: AngularXAngle_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: X-axis limit for angular motion when using the "Angular" constraint type (Set to 0 to lock, or 180 to remain free)

Variables.Name: AngularYAngle_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Y-axis limit for angular motion when using the "Angular" constraint type (Set to 0 to lock, or 180 to remain free)

Variables.Name: AngularZAngle_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Z-axis limit for angular motion when using the "Angular" constraint type (Set to 0 to lock, or 180 to remain free)

Variables.Name: AngularTargetAxis
Variables.Description: Axis on body1 to match to the angular target direction.

Variables.Name: AngularTarget
Variables.Description: Target direction to face for body1 (in body0 local space)

Variables.Name: bLinearFullyLocked
Variables.Description:
The values below are calculated on initialisation and used when building the limits 
	 If all axes are locked we can use 3 linear limits instead of the 6 needed for limited axes
